import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let bo = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bo
    when Some(bv)
      if bv == 32 or bv == 9 or bv == 13 or bv == 10
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(bv)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn search(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

match search(xs, target)
when Some(i)
  print("index=#{i}")
when None
  print("not_found")
end
